phrases.intent_en: Ask where the luggage storage is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo dejar el equipaje en consigna?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh PWEH-doh deh-HAHR el eh-kee-PAH-heh en kon-seen-YAH?

likely_response.local: Siga las señales hacia la planta sótano uno.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-gah LAHS seh-NYAH-lehs ah-THEE-ah LAH PLAHN-tah SÓ-tah-noh OO-noh
likely_response.translation_en: Follow signs towards the basement level one.

responses.english: Follow signs towards the basement level one.
responses.phonetic: SEE-gah LAHS seh-NYAH-lehs ah-THEE-ah LAH PLAHN-tah SÓ-tah-noh OO-noh
responses.french: Siga las señales hacia la planta sótano uno.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the AVE departure gates are
phrases.text_local: Perdón, ¿dónde están los accesos para los trenes AVE?
phrases.pronunciation: Pehr-DOHN, ¿DOHN-deh eh-STAHN lohs ahk-SEH-sohs PAH-rah lohs TREH-nehs AH-beh?

likely_response.local: Pase el jardín tropical, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAH-seh EHL hahr-DÍN troh-pee-KAHL AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the red signs towards the controls.

responses.english: Follow the red signs towards the controls.
responses.phonetic: PAH-seh EHL hahr-DÍN troh-pee-KAHL AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: Pase el jardín tropical, a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the AVE ticket counter is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la taquilla de AVE?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah tah-KEE-yah deh AH-veh?

likely_response.local: En la planta baja, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH PLAHN-tah BAH-hah AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: On the ground floor, to the right.

responses.english: On the ground floor, to the right.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH PLAHN-tah BAH-hah AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: En la planta baja, a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tropical garden is

likely_response.local: Siga recto tras la zona de taquillas, a
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-gah REHTH-toh TRAHS LAH THOH-nah DEH tah-k-EEL-lahs AH
likely_response.translation_en: It is in the central hall, free access.

responses.english: It is in the central hall, free access.
responses.phonetic: SEE-gah REHTH-toh TRAHS LAH THOH-nah DEH tah-k-EEL-lahs AH
responses.french: Siga recto tras la zona de taquillas, a
